exercises.name: Plate Loaded Bench Press
exercises.notes: Hold — RPE 8 last session. Two sessions at 70kg now. Third at RPE ≤7 earns +2.5kg.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Hold at 20kg — RPE 9 at 9 reps on 06-09 (17.5s were unavailable, effectively a weight jump). Build reps to 12 before progressing.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Hold — RPE 9 at 10 reps on 06-09. Aim for 12 reps before adding load.

exercises.name: Reverse Curl
exercises.notes: Hold at 20kg — hit 3x12 at RPE 8 on 06-09. Clean reps at RPE ≤7 earns +2.5kg next time.
